title: Pick Up Me
description: Adds the ability to pick up other players on head by right-clicking on them.
body:
This mod has been deprecated, as its core functionality has been merged into [Player Ladder](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-ladder)(1.21+). Please use that instead!


### **Description**

Simple server-side fabric mod. Adds the ability to pick up other players on head by right-clicking on them.
The mod is optional on the client side. If installed, it slightly offsets passengers in first person.

In **1.19.4+**, it also gives the ability to mount entities on players by using /ride.

The idea for the mod was suggested by SnapieBee.
